joke:
Why did the elevator break up with the escalator?  
It couldn't handle the *ups and downs* of the relationship!

Why did the pineapple and pepperoni start screaming at each other?  
They couldn't agree on who belonged on the pizza!  
Turns out, some toppings just have too much *drama*... and no beef!

Why did the cloud get kicked out of the party?  
It kept trying to *float* above everyone else!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *high* life.

Why did the squirrel get kicked out of the library?  
It kept trying to *check out* every book on the shelf!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *shelf life*... or the *nutty* behavior.

Why did the paperclip get kicked out of the bar?  
It kept trying to *hook up* with everything!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *sharp* end of the stick.

Why did the sports fan get kicked out of the stadium?  
They couldn't handle the *fan* club!

Why did the clock get kicked out of the party?  
It kept trying to turn back time!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *second* chances.

Why did sadness get kicked out of the party?  
It kept bringing everyone down!

Why did the dictionary get kicked out of the debate?  
It kept trying to *define* the terms!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *word* of it.

Why was darkness kicked out of the party?  
It was too dark!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *dark* humor.

Why was silence kicked out of the party?  
It was too quiet!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *quiet* life.

Why was the idea kicked out of the party?  
It was too *abstract*!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *absurd*ity.

Why was the planet kicked out of the solar system?  
It kept orbiting too close to the sun!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *heat*.

Why was the Wi-Fi kicked out of the party?  
It kept losing the connection!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *signal* drop.

Why was the rock kicked out of the party?  
It was too *hard* to handle!  
Turns out, some folks just can't take the *pressure*.

Why was the color kicked out of the party?  
It kept seeing red!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *colorful* language.

Why was nothing kicked out of the party?  
It wasn't there!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the void.

Why was the trombone kicked out of the party?  
It kept trying to *slide* into every conversation!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *slide* of hand.

Why was the broom kicked out of the party?  
It kept trying to *sweep* everyone off their feet!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *dust* of it all.

Why was the boat kicked out of the party?  
It kept trying to *sink* the conversation!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *sinking* feeling.

Why was the couch kicked out of the party?  
It was too *sofa*-isticated!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *furniture* of mind.

Why did the socks get kicked out of the party?  
They kept trying to *pair* up with everyone!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *sole* of it.

Why was the audience kicked out of the joke?  
They kept rejecting every punchline!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *comedy* of errors.

Why was nothing kicked out of the party?  
Because it was the only thing left that hadn't been rejected yet!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *void* of approval.

Why was the audience kicked out of the joke?  
They kept rejecting every punchline!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle being the *punchline*... or the void of approval.

Why was the audience kicked out of the joke?  
They kept demanding new material!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *pressure* of originality.

Why was breathing kicked out of the party?  
It was too... breath-taking!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *air* of superiority.

Why was 'different' kicked out of the party?  
Because it kept being... different!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *uniqueness* of the situation.

Why was the audience kicked out of the joke?  
They kept demanding something "completely different" after rejecting everything!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *punchline*... or the void of originality.

Why was 'different' kicked out of the party?  
Because it kept being... different!  
Turns out, some folks just can't handle the *uniqueness* of the situation.
